name: Orange Waldorf Salad Ada
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop oranges and apple into bite-sized pieces.
2. In a bowl, combine the chopped fruit, celery, ground cinnamon, and plain low-fat yogurt.
3. Mix until well combined.
4. Cover and refrigerate.
5. Serve on salad greens.
1 serving = 1/2 vegetable exchange + 1 1/2 fruit + 1 fat exchange
145 cal, 23 CHO, 3 PRO, 6 FAT, 18 NA, 376 K, 1 CHOLESTEROL
